description_long: This is a single-family house surrounded by a dense arrangement of mature trees and landscaping, providing privacy and shade. The house features a light gray gable roof and white exterior walls, with multiple windows distributed across its facade. There is a driveway leading to a garage on one side, with several parked cars visible, and a swimming pool in the backyard area. The property is bordered by a sidewalk and street, with additional vehicles parked along the curb. The front entryway is partially obscured by trees but appears to include a small porch and steps. The overall setting suggests a suburban neighborhood with well-maintained grounds and a focus on outdoor living spaces.
description: A suburban house with a gray gable roof, white walls, and a landscaped yard with mature trees, driveway, garage, and backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entryway, and dense tree coverage along the street.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and more of the backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back of the house, visible windows, and extensive tree coverage obscuring much of the structure.
description_view_3: Side view showing the street, parked cars, and the house's side elevation with additional landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Small porch with steps, partially obscured by trees, simple door design, no prominent columns or overhangs
